Banner.title: The Ultimate Convenience For Busy People
Banner.subtitle: Experience the Convenience of In-Home Barber Services
Banner.addressVal: 33/1 Quốc Hương, P. An Khánh, TP. HCM

About.title: YOUR PERSONAL BARBER SERVICE AT YOUR HOME
About.description: T99 brings the professional salon-grade haircutting experience right into the comfort of your own home. No travel, no waiting lines—your personal barber arrives fully equipped to craft your perfect style.

HomeAboutService.description: T99 delivers salon-grade haircutting and styling experiences in an elegant, sophisticated atmosphere. Our seasoned barbers pay obsessive attention to every detail.

HomeServices.tagline: T99 BARBER SHOP - FROM HEART TO HAIR!
HomeServices.title: SERVICES & PRODUCTS
HomeServices.subtitle: At T99 Barbershop you will experience top-notch services in a professional, friendly, and welcoming atmosphere!
HomeServices.card1Desc: T99 provides a full range of haircutting: Wash & Cut, Senior Cut, Master Cut, and Chemical Treatments: Perm, Straightening, Dyeing...
HomeServices.card2Desc: Experience a calm and soothing ambiance for ultimate relaxation.
HomeServices.card3Desc: T99 offers authentic, high-quality hair care and styling products for all hair types.
HomeServices.haircutDesc: Professional styling cut, hair wash & head massage.
HomeServices.shaveDesc: Clean straight razor shave with relaxing hot towel treatment.
HomeServices.comboDesc: Comprehensive package for haircut, beard trim & facial care.
HomeServices.kidDesc: Gentle, fun and friendly haircut for young boys.

Services.title: BROWSE OUR SERVICES
Services.subtitle: We offer a full range of professional in-home grooming services, tailored specifically for your style and convenience.
Services.adultHaircutDesc: Professional styling cut tailored to your facial structure and personal style.
Services.kidsHaircutDesc: Gentle, friendly haircutting service designed for young boys.
Services.beardTrimDesc: Neat and sharp trimming using professional clipper tools.
Services.neckShaveDesc: Clean neck shave using traditional straight razors and hot towel treatment.
Services.scalpMoisturizingDesc: Relaxing head massage with essential oils to moisturize scalp and hair.
Services.beardGroomingDesc: Comprehensive washing, conditioning and styling with premium beard oils.

HomeContactInfo.description: Leave your contact info and details, and we will get back to you immediately to confirm your appointment.

Promo.title: EXPERIENCE THE LUXURY OF CONCIERGE BARBER SERVICES AT YOUR HOME

HomePromo.title: EXPERIENCE PROFESSIONAL GROOMING SERVICES AT T99 BARBER SHOP

WhyChoose.title: WHY CHOOSE US
WhyChoose.subtitle: We pride ourselves on being the trusted destination for thousands of clients, delivering top-tier service and professional craftsmanship from the finest barbers.
WhyChoose.feat1Desc: Our team of licensed and insured barbers follow strict cleanliness and sanitation guidelines for a safe and comfortable experience.
WhyChoose.feat2Desc: Our barbers are passionate about their craft and aim to provide high-quality haircuts for every client.
WhyChoose.feat3Desc: We have a strong online reputation with a 5-star rating from over 100 thousand satisfied clients.
WhyChoose.quoteContent: An incredibly impressive in-home haircutting experience. The barber is highly professional, tools are clean, and the service is extremely thoughtful. I will definitely continue using T99.

Contact.title: MAKE AN APPOINTMENT
Contact.description: Leave your contact info and details, and we will get back to you immediately to confirm your appointment.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.policyNote: By clicking "Book Now", you agree to Easysalon's Personal Data Protection Policy.
Booking.successDesc: T99 BARBERSHOP thanks you for your successful booking.

BarberTeam.title: MEET OUR MASTER BARBERS
BarberTeam.subtitle: Our team of highly skilled, passionate artisans dedicated to precision grooming and timeless style for every gentleman.

TrendingStyles.title: TRENDING HAIRSTYLES GALLERY
TrendingStyles.subtitle: Explore top gentleman hairstyle trends meticulously crafted by T99 master barbers.
TrendingStyles.style1Desc: Modern short haircut with natural layered crop top and sharp skin fade finish.
TrendingStyles.style2Desc: Timeless gentleman side part with elegant volume and refined shine.
TrendingStyles.style3Desc: Dynamic quiff top with bold high skin fade for a confident style.
TrendingStyles.style4Desc: Sophisticated slicked back hair paired with a seamless drop fade contours.

Products.title: STYLING & GROOMING ESSENTIALS
Products.subtitle: Discover our signature line of hair pomades, grooming sprays, and natural nourishing oils crafted by T99 Barbershop.
Products.item1Desc: Strong hold matte finish styling clay designed for a natural, non-greasy texture and all-day control.
Products.item2Desc: Pre-styling spray offering heat protection, weightless volume, and scalp revitalization.
Products.item3Desc: Nourishing beard and hair oil infused with Argan and Jojoba oils for a soft touch and subtle masculine scent.
